name: Codeflow Enforcer
description: Thread-scoped hard enforcement for Codeflow skill workflows.

blockSubagents.label: Block Subagents
blockSubagents.help: When enabled, Codeflow blocks AI tool calls to sessions_spawn and subagents while enforcement is active. User /subagents commands are not intercepted here.

queryCacheMs.label: Query Cache (ms)
queryCacheMs.help: Short in-memory cache for guard state lookups.

commandTimeoutMs.label: Command Timeout (ms)
commandTimeoutMs.help: Timeout for codeflow guard shell calls.
